IncomeTaxCalculator.TITLE: Income Tax Calculator
IncomeTaxCalculator.INCOME_TAX_DESCRIPTION: Instantly calculate your income tax liability across multiple countries. See detailed breakdowns by tax bracket and understand your effective tax rate.
IncomeTaxCalculator.ENTER_INCOME: Enter an income to see your tax breakdown
IncomeTaxCalculator.PROGRESSIVE_TAX_SYSTEM_DESC: Most countries use a progressive tax system where higher income is taxed at higher rates. Our calculator breaks down exactly how much you pay in each bracket.
IncomeTaxCalculator.STANDARD_DEDUCTIONS_DESC: We automatically apply standard deductions where applicable. For example, the US has a $14,600 standard deduction for single filers in 2024.
IncomeTaxCalculator.EFFECTIVE_VS_MARGINAL_RATE_DESC: Your effective tax rate is the actual percentage of income you pay in taxes, which is typically lower than your marginal (highest bracket) rate.

MortgageCalculator.TITLE: Mortgage Calculator
MortgageCalculator.DESCRIPTION: Plan your home purchase with detailed mortgage calculations. Compare monthly payments, view amortization schedules, and understand the total cost of your loan.
MortgageCalculator.UNDERSTANDING_YOUR_PAYMENT_DESC: Your monthly mortgage payment includes principal, interest, property taxes, and insurance (PITI). Our calculator breaks down each component to give you a complete picture.
MortgageCalculator.PRIVATE_MORTGAGE_INSURANCE_DESC: In some countries, if your down payment is less than 20%, lenders typically require PMI. This protects the lender if you default on your loan. PMI can be removed once you reach 20% equity.
MortgageCalculator.AMORTIZATION_EXPLAINED_DESC: Early in your loan, most of your payment goes toward interest. Over time, more goes toward principal. Our amortization schedule shows exactly how your loan balance decreases.

GetStarted.TITLE: Get Started
GetStarted.DESCRIPTION: Choose your plan to get started
GetStarted.YOU_CAN_ONLY_SELECT: You can only select up to

CorporateTaxCalculator.TITLE: Corporate Tax Calculator
CorporateTaxCalculator.DESCRIPTION: Calculate corporate tax liability for your business across multiple countries. Understand tax rates, deductions, and effective tax rates.
CorporateTaxCalculator.ENTER_REVENUE: Enter revenue to see tax calculation
CorporateTaxCalculator.UNDERSTANDING_CORPORATE_TAX_DESC: Corporate tax rates vary by country and region. Some countries have flat rates while others use progressive brackets. Our calculator applies country-specific rules to give you accurate estimates.
CorporateTaxCalculator.DEDUCTIONS_AND_CREDITS_DESC: Businesses can reduce taxable income through deductions like operating expenses, depreciation, and R&D credits. We factor in common deductions based on your country's tax code.
CorporateTaxCalculator.EFFECTIVE_VS_STATUTORY_RATE_DESC: The statutory rate is the official tax rate, while the effective rate is what you actually pay after deductions and credits. Understanding both helps with financial planning.
